title: Stakeholders' Perceptions of the Nord Stream 2 Project 2019
description: The data consist of interviews of stakeholder representatives on the Nord Stream 2 project in Hanko and Kotka. The interviews focused especially on the interaction between stakeholders and the project company. All seven interviews were conducted in English. There are a total of eight interviewees as one of the interviews was conducted as a pair interview.
